title: E-Commerce 3D Product Box Main Image
sourceTitle: E Commerce Main Image 3D Product Box Dieline Visualization

imagePrompts.prompt: Assemble the dieline into a flawless 3D box with accurate panels, clean folds, undistorted type, and artwork preserved exactly. shoot it upright at a refined ¾ angle in a {argument name="setting" default="minimal premium studio setting"} with a soft neutral background, diffused light, subtle shadows, no props, true colours, {argument name="texture" default="matte paperboard texture"}, and realistic editorial detail
imagePrompts.title: E Commerce Main Image 3D Product Box Dieline Visualization

imagePrompts.prompt: Assemble the dieline into a flawless 3D box with accurate panels, clean folds, undistorted type, and artwork preserved exactly. shoot it upright at a refined ¾ angle in a {argument name="setting" default="minimal premium studio setting"} with a soft neutral background, diffused light, subtle shadows, no props, true colours, {argument name="texture" default="matte paperboard texture"}, and realistic editorial detail
imagePrompts.title: E Commerce Main Image 3D Product Box Dieline Visualization

prompt: Assemble the dieline into a flawless 3D box with accurate panels, clean folds, undistorted type, and artwork preserved exactly. shoot it upright at a refined ¾ angle in a {argument name="setting" default="minimal premium studio setting"} with a soft neutral background, diffused light, subtle shadows, no props, true colours, {argument name="texture" default="matte paperboard texture"}, and realistic editorial detail
originalPrompt: Assemble the dieline into a flawless 3D box with accurate panels, clean folds, undistorted type, and artwork preserved exactly. shoot it upright at a refined ¾ angle in a {argument name="setting" default="minimal premium studio setting"} with a soft neutral background, diffused light, subtle shadows, no props, true colours, {argument name="texture" default="matte paperboard texture"}, and realistic editorial detail

promptTranslations.zh: 将模切线组装成一个完美的3D包装盒，面板准确，折痕清晰，文字无变形，且艺术设计得到精确保留。以精致的3/4角度直立拍摄，置于 {argument name="setting" default="极简高级摄影棚环境"} 中，背景柔和中性，光线漫射，阴影细微，无道具，色彩真实，采用 {argument name="texture" default="哑光纸板质感"}，并呈现逼真的编辑级细节。
promptTranslations.fr: Assemblez le tracé de découpe en une boîte 3D impeccable avec des panneaux précis, des plis nets, une typographie non déformée et une illustration préservée exactement. Photographiez-la droite sous un angle raffiné de ¾ dans un {argument name="setting" default="cadre de studio minimaliste premium"} avec un arrière-plan neutre doux, une lumière diffuse, des ombres subtiles, sans accessoires, des couleurs fidèles, une {argument name="texture" default="texture de carton mat"} et des détails éditoriaux réalistes.
promptTranslations.ru: Соберите развертку в безупречную 3D-коробку с точными гранями, аккуратными сгибами, неискаженным текстом и в точности сохраненным дизайном. Сфотографируйте ее в вертикальном положении под изысканным углом ¾ в {argument name="setting" default="минималистичной студийной обстановке премиум-класса"} с мягким нейтральным фоном, рассеянным светом, мягкими тенями, без лишних предметов, естественными цветами, {argument name="texture" default="текстурой матового картона"} и реалистичной редакционной детализацией.
promptTranslations.pt: Monte o dieline em uma caixa 3D impecável com painéis precisos, dobras limpas, tipografia sem distorção e arte preservada exatamente. Fotografe-a na vertical em um ângulo refinado de ¾ em um {argument name="setting" default="cenário de estúdio premium minimalista"} com um fundo neutro suave, luz difusa, sombras sutis, sem adereços, cores fiéis, {argument name="texture" default="textura de papelão fosco"} e detalhes editoriais realistas.
promptTranslations.ja: 展開図を正確なパネルと折り目で完璧な3Dボックスに組み立ててください。文字やアートワークは歪ませず、正確に再現すること。被写体は直立させ、洗練された{argument name="setting" default="ミニマルで高級感のあるスタジオ設定"}にて、斜め45度（3/4アングル）から撮影してください。背景はニュートラルで柔らかな色調とし、拡散光を用いて繊細な影を落とします。小物は配置せず、色は忠実に再現し、{argument name="texture" default="マットな紙の質感"}を活かした、編集写真のようなリアルなディテールで仕上げてください。
promptTranslations.ko: 전개도를 정확한 패널, 깔끔한 접선, 왜곡 없는 타이포그래피와 아트워크가 완벽하게 보존된 3D 박스로 조립할 것. {argument name="setting" default="미니멀한 프리미엄 스튜디오 환경"}에서 부드러운 중립 배경, 확산광, 미세한 그림자, 소품 없음, 실제 색상, {argument name="texture" default="무광 페이퍼보드 질감"}, 그리고 사실적인 에디토리얼 디테일을 살려 3/4 앵글로 정면 촬영할 것.
